title: Atlas Opens the Way Forward
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Five Elders, Unknown person #8, Seraphim, Unknown person #9, Luffy as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Five Elders
dialogue.text: Elders!! You just interrupted the Trans- Mission!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And to those that have suffered for this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The snail's Memory Circuit is still intact!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have to destroy it directly if you want to shut it down for good!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I can only pray my voice reaches you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's the Cipher Pol agents and a bunch of debris!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They're falling out of the sky?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look, old Timers!! That monster's spitting them out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Daha ha ha, it's like a fountain!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's coming for us!! We gotta hurry and get some distance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's gonna suck us in!! Move it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it!! After all the progress we made, he's pulling us back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Furl the sails!! Use the OARS instead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A giant white monster and raining cyber pol agents!!

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
